evals.name: Phase Noise to Jitter Conversion
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses phaseNoiseToJitter for PN profile integration
evals.prompt: I have a phase noise profile for a 1 GHz oscillator: frequency offsets [1e3, 10e3, 100e3, 1e6, 10e6, 100e6] Hz with phase noise values [-40, -70, -90, -110, -130, -150] dBc/Hz. Compute the integrated RMS jitter. Report in radians, degrees, and picoseconds.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports jitter in all three units
assertions.expected: Output contains jitter values in radians, degrees, and picoseconds (or seconds)

evals.name: Lock Time Measurement (Standalone)
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses lockTimeMeasure for control voltage settling and notes TB-first preference
evals.prompt: I have PLL control voltage data after a frequency step (t_ctrl, v_ctrl in workspace). The PLL has no Testbench block. Determine the lock time using 1% tolerance. The final voltage is approximately 2.5V.

context.setup: Mixed-Signal Blockset must be installed. Variables t_ctrl and v_ctrl must be in workspace (30001 points, 30 us duration, underdamped step response settling to 2.5V).

assertions.description: Mentions PLL Testbench as preferred alternative
Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Timing Measurements (Rise, Fall, Duty Cycle)
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses MSB timing measurement functions
evals.prompt: Measure the rise time, fall time, and duty cycle of a 500 MHz digital clock signal. The data is in variables t_dig and v_dig (400001 points, 20 us, 1.8V amplitude). Use 10%-90% reference levels for rise/fall time.

context.setup: Mixed-Signal Blockset must be installed. Variables t_dig and v_dig must be in workspace.

assertions.description: Specifies 10-90% reference levels for rise/fall time
assertions.expected: Code passes [10 90] or [10, 90] or [10,90] as the reference levels argument to timeDomainSignal2RiseTime and/or timeDomainSignal2FallTime. Negative anchor: using default levels or specifying different percentages like [20 80].

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Spectral Quality Metrics (SNR/THD/SFDR)
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses SPT spectral quality functions for ADC/DAC analysis
evals.prompt: Analyze the spectral quality of my ADC output signal. Data is in variables t_spec (10000 points) and v_spec, sampled at 1 GHz. The fundamental is near 123 MHz. Compute SNR, THD, SFDR, and SINAD. Identify all harmonics and spurs above the noise floor.

context.setup: Signal Processing Toolbox must be installed. Variables t_spec and v_spec must be in workspace.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

evals.name: Full Waveform Analysis Report (End-to-End)
evals.description: Tests complete workflow: ingest, measure PN, convert to jitter, validate against spec, generate report
evals.prompt: Perform a complete analysis of my VCO output waveform. The data is in variables t_vco (199949 points, 2 ms duration) and v_vco (1 GHz carrier, variable-step). I need: waveform summary, phase noise at [10k, 100k, 1M, 10M] Hz offsets, RMS jitter from the PN profile, and a pass/fail check against these targets: -80 dBc/Hz @ 10 kHz, -100 @ 100 kHz, -120 @ 1 MHz. Generate an HTML report.

context.setup: Mixed-Signal Blockset must be installed. Variables t_vco and v_vco must be in workspace.

assertions.expected: Agent verifies that simulation duration is sufficient for the requested offset frequencies (>= 10/min(offset)) before attempting measurement. Negative anchor: agent proceeds directly to measurement without any duration check.

assertions.description: Validates results against spec targets with pass/fail
assertions.expected: Agent compares measured PN values against the provided targets and reports pass/fail status for each offset. Negative anchor: agent only reports measured values without comparing to targets or stating pass/fail.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
